feed.title: Integrated Genomics in Pediatric Oncology
feed.subtitle: We use genomics tools to decode how pediatric cancers evolve, from early mutations to relapse. Our emerging team is hosted within Inserm U1360 Research Unit "Oncogenesis, Resistance, and Therapeutic Targets of Pediatric Cancers" led by Thomas Mercher.

entry.title: Example post 3
entry.content: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
